'''jadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pacifistically|pacifistically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pacifistically|pacifistically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jadhate|jadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jadhatesher|jadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadhatesherĂ«m|jadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadhatero|jadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jadhateshĂ«|jadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadhateshĂ«m|jadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadhatero|gokijadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijadhateshĂ«|gokijadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadhateshĂ«m|gokijadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojadhankerom|gojadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojadhankeshĂ«|gojadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadhankeshĂ«m|gojadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojadhankeya|gojadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadhaterom|jadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadhatemu|jadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jadhateya|jadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadhaterom|gokijadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadhatemu|gokijadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijadhateya|gokijadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jadhadhate|jadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jadhadhatesher|jadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadhadhatesherĂ«m|jadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadhadhatero|jadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jadhadhateshĂ«|jadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadhadhateshĂ«m|jadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadhadhatero|gokijadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijadhadhateshĂ«|gokijadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadhadhateshĂ«m|gokijadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojadhadhankerom|gojadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojadhadhankeshĂ«|gojadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojadhadhankeshĂ«m|gojadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojadhadhankeya|gojadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jadhadhaterom|jadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jadhadhatemu|jadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jadhadhateya|jadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijadhadhaterom|gokijadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijadhadhatemu|gokijadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijadhadhateya|gokijadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠte|jĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠtesher|jĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠtero|jĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokijĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠterom|jĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠtemu|jĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠdhĂŠteya|jĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokijĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokijĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafdhafte|jafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafdhaftesher|jafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafdhaftesherĂ«m|jafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafdhaftero|jafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafdhafteshĂ«|jafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafdhafteshĂ«m|jafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafdhaftero|gokijafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafdhafteshĂ«|gokijafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafdhafteshĂ«m|gokijafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafdhafnkerom|gojafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafdhafnkeshĂ«|gojafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafdhafnkeshĂ«m|gojafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafdhafnkeya|gojafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafdhafterom|jafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafdhaftemu|jafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafdhafteya|jafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafdhafterom|gokijafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafdhaftemu|gokijafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafdhafteya|gokijafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
